emails.subject: Deals-LADWPPX
emails.body: I think I sent something about this to you yesterday here's a friendly reminder from Houston. Let me know if you guys want help changing these deals. Kate Forwarded by Kate Symes/PDX/ECT on 12/14/2000 08:52 AM Melissa Ann Murphy 12/14/2000 06:11 AM

emails.subject: Re: Deals-LADWPPX
emails.body: Re: Deals-LADWPPX Kate, Geir is out of the office until Monday, I will change the counterparties in the deals for him. If Houston asks again, you can let them know that it is taken care of. Thank you for the heads up... Bill
